Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 2: Game Server Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.1[/color] If banned from a role, you must not play that role. This includes seeking or accepting promotions into roles you are banned from, or taking ghost roles which hold the role. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.2[/color] It is forbidden to livestream rounds. [color=#cc0000]★★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.3[/color] Do not Ghost/Ghostrole with the intent of checking which players may be ERPing . [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.4[/color] Do not utilize any known or unknown glitches, exploits or bugs to gain advantage. [color=#cc0000]★★★[/color]
- [color=#a4885c]2.4A[/color] If you find something suspicious: report it on the Discord in an ahelp ticket. If it is something which requires immediate action, ahelp it.
[color=#a4885c]2.5[/color] Ban evasion will result in a permanent community ban. [color=#cc0000]★★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.6[/color] All characters must both be and act in a way resembling the age of adulthood. Any characters in violation of this are strictly forbidden, as is discussion of such activities. [color=#cc0000]★★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]2.7[/color] End-of-round-griefing (EORG) is not allowed under any circumstance. This includes but is not limited to: fighting, explosives, chemicals, destruction of property, or any other disruptive behavior. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
- [color=#a4885c]2.7A[/color] EOR safe time starts with the end of round announcement, when there are 10 minutes left in the shift, and continues until we are in the lobby. This is to allow time for players to save their ships without disruption.
